desc: Audit the saved J614s ADT and current DT for a USB2 host-only path (usb-drd0..2 t8132 fallback, dart,t8110, power domains); produce a buildable external-disk/ethernet candidate plus exact access manifest, excluding the parked gadget console and unknown ATC PHY buckets (ROADMAP Stage D USB; done/2026-07-10-t6040-atc-usb-dart-plan.md)
author: sol
